result:
All 30 tests pass. I added the following commands to the existing Go implementation:

- **`status`** — prints staged files or `(none)` if empty
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores files from commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory, clears index
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent

A shared `parseCommitFiles` helper was added to avoid duplicating the commit-parsing logic across the new commands.
